transcript: Memories are weird. Like, how did I get to that specific memory? I was thinking about taxes. That connected with other stressful memories. Then I thought, how do I de-stress? Incense. Fire. Fire. Water. Water. Types of water. Last time I went to a river, and there we are. So many memories from different eras of my life all accessed in a few seconds to create a winding trail from taxes to a river. And who knows how I got started on taxes? Miss Clemons, did we lose connection? Oh, no, yeah, I'm here. That sounds good. Okay,, moving on, we all- I'll never understand why daydreaming is looked down on. You have this huge database of a million crazy things you've experienced. How are people not just flipping through it constantly? Ugh. Some memories I try to forget. Hard to forget a memory, though memory though on purpose at least i know i'm forgetting memories all the time but it's impossible to know which ones some could just be buried but still there others are gone i like taking pictures on film something about it just makes the images feel like memories the color the subtle grain soft faces sometimes I won't finish a roll of film for months makes finally getting the developed photos feel like forgotten memories. With all the pictures and videos we take nowadays, I wonder if we'll be able to keep memories fresh for much longer than previous generations. Not sure if that's a good thing. Maybe we weren't supposed to remember everything. There is danger of the atomic bomb. Bitter. Sometimes those thoughts just start, and it's hard to stop them. If only I could just... forget. Ellie! Hey! Hi! Do I know you? What? Ellie, listen. We need to talk about... We need to talk about what happened. What are you referring to? You know, Josh. Why are you acting like you don't remember? Wait, wait, put the mask on. I miss him. Hey, buddy. Hey. He's not waking up Listen, I looked it up And not reporting it is illegal We could go to jail How would anyone ever find out that we were with him at the time? Listen, what if What if people remember that we used to hang out together? I don't think they will. Even I've already forgotten. © BF-WATCH TV 2021
